ticket.title: Implement user-level memory (preferences, profile, AgentCore namespace)
ticket.description: Persist stable user preferences/profile in DynamoDB; MemoryManager over SessionStore with Pydantic schemas.

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the architecture, the storage decision, and the PRD; conventions/policy are workspace, the agent_run summary and the smoke release note are out of scope, Robin's Codex note is local.

qa_agent.rationale: QA swaps the PRD for the smoke release note; workspace/project and agent_run entries are out of scope, Robin's note is local.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the decision/conventions/PRD/policy; codebase, agent_run, and release entries are out of scope, Robin's note is local.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the decision/conventions/PRD/release/policy; the codebase architecture and the agent_run summary are out of scope, Robin's note is local.

human_teammate.rationale: Every candidate is team-visible or Robin's own local note, so she sees all of them — the human baseline as the full superset.
